title: Maula Mera Le Le Meri Jann

lines.lyrics: Teejaa tera raang tha mai toh
lines.indian: Sa' Sa' Sa' Sa' Ni Sa' Re' Sa' Sa' Sa'

lines.lyrics: Teejaa tera raang tha mai toh
lines.indian: Sa' Sa' Sa' Sa' Ni Sa' Re' Sa' Sa' Sa'

lines.lyrics: Jiyaa teraa dhang sai mai toh
lines.indian: Sa' Sa' Sa' Sa' Ni Sa' Re' Sa' Sa' Sa'

lines.lyrics: Tuhii thaa maula tu hi aan
lines.indian: Ni Sa' Ni D(K).P Pa ma Pa ma ma Ga Re Sa.

lines.lyrics: Maulaa mera le le meri jaan
lines.indian: Sa Sa ma Re ma Pa D(K).N(K) D(K).P Pa.
